meta.question: 什麼 是人工智慧 請詳細說明
meta.stack: Deepgram STT - OpenRouter LLM - CosyVoice2 (vLLM/WSL) TTS - MuseTalk avatar

events.label: User speaking
events.why: Browser mic -> WebRTC -> Silero VAD listens for the end of the utterance.

events.label: Deepgram nova-2 streaming (receives mic)
events.why: STT's input is the live mic the whole time the user talks; partials refine into one final transcript.

events.label: User STOPPED speaking - t0
events.why: VAD + turn-analyzer agree the turn ended. This instant starts the <3s TTFO stopwatch.

events.label: STT emits final transcript
events.why: "什麼 是人工智慧 請詳細說明" pushed into the LLM context aggregator.

events.label: ◯ LLM receives the transcript
events.why: Generation starts at t0; the LLM was pre-warmed on connect, so no cold start.

events.label: OpenRouter generating
events.why: Streams tokens; the whole answer is ready well before TTS finishes sentence 1.

events.label: LLM emits first token
events.why: OpenRouter TTFB 0.726s - the transpacific cloud hop is the LLM's main cost.

events.label: ◯ TTS receives sentence 1
events.why: "人工智慧很簡單。" First complete sentence flushed early so TTS can start before the full answer exists.

events.label: CosyVoice synthesizing sentence 1
events.why: First audio at TTFB 0.838s; done at +1.58s. This first chunk is the single biggest piece of TTFO.

events.label: TTS emits sentence-1 first chunk
events.why: CosyVoice TTFB 0.838s after receiving the sentence. This is what starts the bot speaking.

events.label: ◯ TTS receives sentence 2
events.why: Starts as the previous sentence finished - CosyVoice synthesizes one sentence at a time (serial).

events.label: CosyVoice synthesizing sentence 2
events.why: First audio at TTFB 1.722s; done at +3.31s. Synthesized while earlier audio is already playing, so it doesn't affect TTFO.

events.label: TTS emits sentence-2 first chunk
events.why: CosyVoice TTFB 1.722s after receiving the sentence.

events.label: ◯ TTS receives sentence 3
events.why: Starts as the previous sentence finished - CosyVoice synthesizes one sentence at a time (serial).

events.label: CosyVoice synthesizing sentence 3
events.why: First audio at TTFB 1.994s; done at +6.54s. Synthesized while earlier audio is already playing, so it doesn't affect TTFO.

events.label: TTS emits sentence-3 first chunk
events.why: CosyVoice TTFB 1.994s after receiving the sentence.

events.label: ◯ TTS receives sentence 4
events.why: Starts as the previous sentence finished - CosyVoice synthesizes one sentence at a time (serial).

events.label: CosyVoice synthesizing sentence 4
events.why: First audio at TTFB 2.028s; done at +8.58s. Synthesized while earlier audio is already playing, so it doesn't affect TTFO.

events.label: TTS emits sentence-4 first chunk
events.why: CosyVoice TTFB 2.028s after receiving the sentence.

events.label: ◯ TTS receives sentence 5
events.why: Starts as the previous sentence finished - CosyVoice synthesizes one sentence at a time (serial).

events.label: CosyVoice synthesizing sentence 5
events.why: First audio at TTFB 2.003s; done at +10.59s. Synthesized while earlier audio is already playing, so it doesn't affect TTFO.

events.label: TTS emits sentence-5 first chunk
events.why: CosyVoice TTFB 2.003s after receiving the sentence.

events.label: ◯ TTS receives sentence 6
events.why: Starts as the previous sentence finished - CosyVoice synthesizes one sentence at a time (serial).

events.label: CosyVoice synthesizing sentence 6
events.why: First audio at TTFB 1.968s; done at +12.56s. Synthesized while earlier audio is already playing, so it doesn't affect TTFO.

events.label: TTS emits sentence-6 first chunk
events.why: CosyVoice TTFB 1.968s after receiving the sentence.

events.label: ◯ TTS receives sentence 7
events.why: Starts as the previous sentence finished - CosyVoice synthesizes one sentence at a time (serial).

events.label: CosyVoice synthesizing sentence 7
events.why: First audio at TTFB 2.104s; done at +14.67s. Synthesized while earlier audio is already playing, so it doesn't affect TTFO.

events.label: TTS emits sentence-7 first chunk
events.why: CosyVoice TTFB 2.104s after receiving the sentence.

events.label: Idle / neutral frames
events.why: A calm neutral face between turns (real-time fps) so the picture is never frozen while TTS works.

events.label: ◯ MuseTalk receives the voice
events.why: The avatar forwards the first PCM chunk to the :8002 render server the instant TTS emits it (real-time-paced).

events.label: Bot started speaking -> TTFO 3.53s
events.why: The VOICE starts reaching the client here. Under the default steady (video-master) sync the voice is HELD until MUSETALK_LEAD_FRAMES lip frames are rendered, then released in step with them -- so this instant is the synced A/V start. TTFO measures it: 3.53s vs the 3s target.

events.label: MuseTalk lip-sync render
events.why: Mouth-region frames, steady/video-master sync (default): the voice is paced to the REAL rendered frames, so a render stall pauses the voice instead of drifting. (MUSETALK_SYNC_MODE=live is the audio-master alternative: voice instant, lips trail best-effort.)

events.label: Bot stopped speaking - turn complete
events.why: Full answer delivered. Mic un-mutes; the assistant aggregator records the turn so the next turn has full history.

handoffs.note: The question text enters the LLM at t0; generation starts immediately (pre-warmed).
First complete sentence flushed early, so speech can begin before the full answer exists.
CosyVoice -> MuseTalk: the avatar forwards the chunk to the :8002 render server the instant TTS emits it.
MuseTalk -> browser: under steady (default) the voice is held for the MUSETALK_LEAD_FRAMES render cushion, then released paced to the real rendered frames. This synced start is TTFO.

sentences: 人工智慧是一種模擬人類智慧的技術，透過電腦系統實現。
這是一種非常廣泛和複雜的領域，涵蓋了很多子領域，如機器學習、自然語言處理、電腦視覺等。
簡單來說，人工智慧就是讓電腦具備學習、推理、感知和互動的能力。
舉個例子，語音助手、推薦系統、自動駕駛汽車等都是人工智慧的應用。
人工智慧的目標是讓電腦能夠自主地完成任務，不需要人類的直接干預。
現在，人工智慧已經在很多行業中得到了廣泛的應用，如醫療、金融、教育等。
